entities.name: Testing & Validation
entities.context: Dimension 5 of evaluation framework, weighted 15%, assesses test planning and coverage

entities.name: Self-Healing & Resilience
entities.context: Dimension 6 of evaluation framework, weighted 15%, assesses failure handling and system robustness

entities.name: Unit Tests
entities.context: Automated testing technique for individual components

entities.name: Integration Tests
entities.context: Automated testing technique for component interactions

entities.name: Manual Testing
entities.context: Basic validation approach, scored lower in framework

entities.name: Coverage Target
entities.context: Measurable percentage goal for test coverage

entities.name: Sync Mechanisms
entities.context: Strategy to prevent drift in system state

entities.name: Graceful Degradation
entities.context: Resilience pattern allowing partial function during failures

entities.name: Self-Correction
entities.context: System capability to automatically fix detected issues

entities.name: Health Checks
entities.context: Monitoring technique requiring manual intervention at mid-tier

entities.name: Quality Gate
entities.context: Threshold check based on weighted total score calculation

relationships.context: Unit tests contribute to high scores in Dimension 5
Integration tests contribute to high scores in Dimension 5
Coverage target is evidence criterion for testing dimension
Measurable validation criteria required for top scores
Automated failure detection required for high resilience scores
Sync mechanisms prevent drift as resilience strategy
Graceful degradation is criterion for resilience scoring
Self-correction capability contributes to top resilience scores
Health checks provide mid-tier resilience capability
Dimension 5 contributes 15% to quality gate calculation
Dimension 6 contributes 15% to quality gate calculation
